title: Wallet
description: Chain-scoped wallet entity. Owned by score-mibera (per [[score-vs-identity-boundary]]); referenced here via address+chain pair. This module's User.wallets[] joins to score's Wallet entity.

chain.description: Chain identifier. Slice-B EVM (ethereum/berachain) + Solana for cubquest. Bitcoin reserved for V2.

address.description: Canonical lowercase for EVM (0x-prefixed 40-hex), base58 for Solana, bech32 for Bitcoin.

verified_via.description: Credential type that proved this wallet's binding to the user. `dynamic` = Dynamic SDK SIWE-equivalent; `legacy` = pre-Dynamic onboarding.

linked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this wallet was linked to the user.

primary.description: True if this is the user's primary wallet (per [[primary-wallet-doctrine]]).
